name: Grade 10 Home Economics & Life Skills — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 10 pathway for deepening analysis, modeling complex ideas, and revising with evidence through Home Economics & Life Skills. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 10 knowledge and transferable skills in deepening analysis, modeling complex ideas, and revising with evidence through Home Economics & Life Skills.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
